ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code where the county is located */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state where the county is located */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (people per square mile) */,
  "total_area" REAL /* Total area of the county (square miles) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county's centroid */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the county */,
  "county_seat" TEXT /* Main administrative city of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the county */,
  "migration_rate" REAL /* Net migration rate (per 1,000 population) */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Birth rate (per 1,000 population) */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Death rate (per 1,000 population) */,
  "bachelor_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population with a bachelor's degree or higher */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate (percentage) */,
  "racial_diversity_index" REAL /* Racial diversity index */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution (e.g., 0-14, 15-64, 65+) */,
  "household_income_distribution" TEXT /* Household income distribution (e.g., < $25k, $25k-$50k, > $50k) */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate (percentage) */,
  "housing_status" TEXT /* Housing status (e.g., 70% owned, 30% rented) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in poverty */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value in the county */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average household size in the county */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate (percentage) */,
  "retirement_rate" REAL /* Retirement rate (percentage) */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  "median_household_income" REAL /* Median household income */,
  "employment_by_sector" TEXT /* Employment by sector (e.g., 30% manufacturing, 40% services, 30% agriculture) */,
  "housing_affordability_index" REAL /* Housing affordability index */,
  "economic_growth_rate" REAL /* Economic growth rate (percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_data" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "high_school_graduation_rate" REAL /* High school graduation rate (percentage) */,
  "college_enrollment_rate" REAL /* College enrollment rate (percentage) */,
  "adult_education_participation_rate" REAL /* Adult education participation rate (percentage) */,
  "early_childhood_education_rate" REAL /* Early childhood education rate (percentage) */,
  "public_school_spending_per_student" REAL /* Public school spending per student (USD) */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate (percentage) */,
  "teacher_to_student_ratio" REAL /* Teacher-to-student ratio */,
  "educational_spending_per_student" REAL /* Educational spending per student (USD) */,
  "graduation_rates_by_race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Graduation rates by race/ethnicity (e.g., 80% White, 90% Black, 85% Hispanic) */,
  "post_secondary_enrollment_rate" REAL /* Post-secondary enrollment rate (percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index (AQI) */,
  "water_quality_index" REAL /* Water quality index */,
  "waste_management_score" REAL /* Waste management score (out of 100) */,
  "green_space_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of land dedicated to green spaces */,
  "renewable_energy_usage" REAL /* Percentage of energy consumption from renewable sources */,
  "air_pollution_levels" TEXT /* Air pollution levels (e.g., PM2.5, O3) */,
  "water_pollution_levels" TEXT /* Water pollution levels (e.g., nitrogen, phosphorus) */,
  "land_use_distribution" TEXT /* Land use distribution (e.g., 50% residential, 30% commercial, 20% agricultural) */,
  "waste_recycling_rate" REAL /* Waste recycling rate (percentage) */,
  "renewable_energy_capacity" REAL /* Renewable energy capacity (megawatts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_data" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "violent_crime_rate" REAL /* Violent crime rate (per 1,000 population) */,
  "property_crime_rate" REAL /* Property crime rate (per 1,000 population) */,
  "homicide_rate" REAL /* Homicide rate (per 100,000 population) */,
  "arson_rate" REAL /* Arson rate (per 100,000 population) */,
  "robbery_rate" REAL /* Robbery rate (per 1,000 population) */,
  "crime_clearance_rate" REAL /* Crime clearance rate (percentage) */,
  "juvenile_crime_rate" REAL /* Juvenile crime rate (per 1,000 population) */,
  "domestic_violence_rate" REAL /* Domestic violence rate (per 1,000 population) */,
  "cybercrime_rate" REAL /* Cybercrime rate (per 1,000 population) */,
  "arrests_per_1000_population" REAL /* Arrests per 1,000 population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_data" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "homelessness_rate" REAL /* Homelessness rate (percentage) */,
  "food_insecurity_rate" REAL /* Food insecurity rate (percentage) */,
  "social_mobility_index" REAL /* Social mobility index (out of 100) */,
  "community_engagement_score" REAL /* Community engagement score (out of 100) */,
  "volunteer_rate" REAL /* Volunteer rate (percentage) */,
  "civic_participation_rate" REAL /* Civic participation rate (percentage) */,
  "community_resources" TEXT /* Community resources (e.g., 10 libraries, 5 parks) */,
  "social_isolation_rate" REAL /* Social isolation rate (percentage) */,
  "quality_of_life_index" REAL /* Quality of life index (out of 100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* User type (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the county data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the county data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user session (in seconds) */,
  "number_of_queries" INTEGER /* Number of data queries made during the session */,
  "data_volume_accessed" INTEGER /* Volume of data accessed (in MB) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
